creator: to2600@gmail.com
text:
Following ports/UPDATING:
pkgdb -Ff
portupgrade -rf pkg-config\*

www/bluefish segfaults at startup with:

[23:18:48]  jimmie@fortytwo <128> [0] ~>bluefish 
ERROR while loading icon: Failed to open file '/usr/X11R6/share/bluefish/icon_php.png': No such file or directory
ERROR while loading icon: Failed to open file '/usr/X11R6/share/bluefish/icon_html.png': No such file or directory
ERROR while loading icon: Failed to open file '/usr/X11R6/share/bluefish/icon_python.png': No such file or directory
ERROR while loading icon: Failed to open file '/usr/X11R6/share/bluefish/icon_c.png': No such file or directory
ERROR while loading icon: Failed to open file '/usr/X11R6/share/bluefish/icon_java.png': No such file or directory
ERROR while loading icon: Failed to open file '/usr/X11R6/share/bluefish/icon_image.png': No such file or directory
ERROR while loading icon: Failed to open file '/usr/X11R6/share/bluefish/icon_image.png': No such file or directory
ERROR while loading icon: Failed to open file '/usr/X11R6/share/bluefish/icon_java.png': No such file or directory
ERROR while loading icon: Failed to open file '/usr/X11R6/share/bluefish/icon_xml.png': No such file or directory
ERROR while loading icon: Failed to open file '/usr/X11R6/share/bluefish/icon_cfml.png': No such file or directory
ERROR while loading icon: Failed to open file '/usr/X11R6/share/bluefish/icon_pascal.png': No such file or directory
ERROR while loading icon: Failed to open file '/usr/X11R6/share/bluefish/icon_r.png': No such file or directory
Segmentation fault

Icons are installed to /usr/local/share/bluefish/

Fix: 

I looked at the Makefile, couldn't easily see it.
How-To-Repeat: (re)Install www/bluefish
